'''tafata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jockeyship|jockeyship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jockeyship|jockeyship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tafata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæfætæth|tæfætæth]] || [[word:tæfætæj|tæfætæj]] || [[word:tæfætæsh|tæfætæsh]] || [[word:tæfætæ|tæfætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tafafatath|tafafatath]] || [[word:tafafataj|tafafataj]] || [[word:tafafatash|tafafatash]] || [[word:tafafata|tafafata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tafatath|tafatath]] || [[word:tafataj|tafataj]] || [[word:tafatash|tafatash]] || [[word:tafata|tafata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tafaftath|tafaftath]] || [[word:tafaftaj|tafaftaj]] || [[word:tafaftash|tafaftash]] || [[word:tafaftaf|tafaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tafatatha|tafatatha]] || [[word:tafataja|tafataja]] || [[word:tafatasha|tafatasha]] || [[word:tafataka|tafataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tafatath|tafatath]] || [[word:tafataj|tafataj]] || [[word:tafatash|tafatash]] || [[word:tafata|tafata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tafatathal|tafatathal]] || [[word:tafatajal|tafatajal]] || [[word:tafatashal|tafatashal]] || [[word:tafatakal|tafatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tafatathatha|tafatathatha]] || [[word:tafatajaja|tafatajaja]] || [[word:tafatashasha|tafatashasha]] || [[word:tafataka|tafataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tafatathan|tafatathan]] || [[word:tafatajan|tafatajan]] || [[word:tafatashan|tafatashan]] || [[word:tafatakan|tafatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tafatathaoro|tafatathaoro]] || [[word:tafatajaoro|tafatajaoro]] || [[word:tafatashaoro|tafatashaoro]] || [[word:tafatakaoro|tafatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
